chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Acq. Appeal No. S – 89 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on MA No.6128/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 20.11.2025 Mr. Ghulam Muhammad, Advocate for the Appellant >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the appellant, under instructions, does not press instant Criminal Acquittal Appeal, which is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge ARBROHI
